text: Drink {sip} if you're wearing socks right now.
{player1} picks two people. Those two race to finish their drinks — loser takes {medium}.
Anyone who's ordered a takeaway alone this week — drink {sip} and respect yourself.
Everyone drinks {sip} for every notification on their phone right now.
{player1} gives out {large} — distribute however you want among the group.
If you've sent a voice note in the last week, drink {sip}.
{player1}: never have I ever — say something and anyone who has done it drinks {sip}.
Drink {small} if you've ever gotten drunk alone.
Give out {large} if you've ever left the continent you were born on.
Drink {sip} if you've ever gone horseback riding.
Drink {sip} if you sleep like a baby after sex.
Drink {sip} if you've ever changed your hair colour.
GAME — Drugs. If you repeat or can't think of one, drink {sip}. {player1}, you start.
Anyone with a pack of cigarettes — drink {sip} per cigarette (8 max).
{player1}: give out {sip} for every person in the group.
